field.name: ma_bp
field.check: ma_bp <> '' and ma_bp not in (select ma_bp from dmbp)

field.name: nh_phi1
field.check: nh_phi1 <> '' and nh_phi1 not in (select ma_nh from dmnhphi where loai_nh = 1)

field.name: nh_phi2
field.check: nh_phi2 <> '' and nh_phi2 not in (select ma_nh from dmnhphi where loai_nh = 2)

field.name: nh_phi3
field.check: nh_phi3 <> '' and nh_phi3 not in (select ma_nh from dmnhphi where loai_nh = 3)

processing.text: if @@admin = 0 and @type = '1' begin if @@sysDatabaseName.dbo.FastBusiness$System$GetAuthorize(@@admin, @@userID, 'Expense', 'Edit') = 0 select @type = '0' end declare @q nvarchar(4000), @duplicate nvarchar(4000), @irregular nvarchar(4000), @irregularChars varchar(128), @field varchar(32), @r int select @irregularChars = &IrregularValue; select @irregular = case @@language when 'v' then N'Giá trị tại ô %invalidCell có chứa các ký tự: ' + @irregularChars else 'The value of cell %invalidCell contains any of the following characters: ' + @irregularChars end select @duplicate = case @@language when 'v' then N'Giá trị tại ô %invalidCell &Expense.Nested.Message.v;.' else 'The value of cell %invalidCell is &Expense.Nested.Message.e;.' end create index i on @@table (ma_phi) -- Delete if @type = '0' delete @@table from @@table a join dmphi b on a.ma_phi = b.ma_phi -- Checking &Checking; select @field = 'ma_phi', @r = min(stt) from @@table where ma_phi like '%[' + @irregularChars + ']%'&Irregular; -- Gather select a.* into #k from @@table a join dmphi b on a.ma_phi = b.ma_phi -- Do not delete following line -- #OverwriteChecking if @type = '1' delete @@table from @@table a where exists(select 1 from #k b where a.ma_phi = b.ma_phi) -- Checking select @field = 'ma_phi' &Expense.Nested.Key.b; select @q = 'select top 1 @r = a.stt from @@table a, @@table b with (index(i)) where a.ma_phi <> b.ma_phi and a.ma_phi like rtrim(b.ma_phi) + ''%''' exec sp_executesql @q, N'@r int output', @r = @r output&Duplicate; select @q = 'select top 1 @r = a.stt from @@table a with (index(i)), dmphi b with (index(PK_dmphi)) where a.ma_phi like rtrim(b.ma_phi) + ''%''' exec sp_executesql @q, N'@r int output', @r = @r output&Duplicate; select @q = 'select top 1 @r = b.stt from dmphi a with (index(PK_dmphi)), @@table b with (index(i)) where a.ma_phi like rtrim(b.ma_phi) + ''%''' exec sp_executesql @q, N'@r int output', @r = @r output&Duplicate; end -- Insert &Inserting; -- Update if @type = '1' begin &Updating; end
